summary: Iteration 4 (showcase + /api/cases + file category/display_name/thumb + self-profile + navbar updates) fully verified. Backend: 17/17 new pytest cases pass plus 24/24 prior regression (test_admin_api.py) still green (test_leads.py has 2 outdated cases from iter 1 — not regressions; GET /api/leads is now admin-protected by design). Frontend: 18/18 UI assertions pass — 2-line brand, nav-cta-login → /admin/login, EN/CN toggle causes no nav-height or hero-height shift, sidebar brand updated to '后台系统/Admin Console' (old 'Topchampion 后台' gone), /admin/profile working (prefilled username, password mismatch toast), ProjectForm has no parameters/drawing_urls fields, showcase toggle reveals 4 sub-inputs, ProjectDetail has separate 图纸/技术代码 sections + toggle-showcase-btn + thumbnails. /api/cases public endpoint returns 200 with the live showcased project (no sensitive fields).

minor.issue: Still uses ProjectIn (name required). Pre-existing from iter 3; UI always sends full payload. Consider a ProjectUpdate model with Optional fields for true PATCH semantics.
Old iteration-1 tests expect GET /api/leads to be public (200) — endpoint is now admin-only (401). The tests are outdated, not a regression.

issues: Underlying text is 'Topchampion Electric & Automation' (mixed case); appears uppercase via CSS text-transform — visual result matches spec but assertive testing tools that read DOM text will see mixed case. Functionally correct.

critical_code_review_comments: Console hydration warning observed on ProjectForm: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Source appears to be Emergent visual-editor instrumentation (x-ve-dynamic / x-excluded spans) wrapping JSX expressions inside <option>{...}</option>. Not user code, but it may produce a console error in production builds. To silence: render plain option text as a single string (no JSX expression children) e.g. <option key={u.id} value={u.id}>{`${u.username} — ${u.full_name||''}`}</option>.

server.py /api/auth/me PATCH does not invalidate the existing JWT after a password or username change. Acceptable here (12h token), but worth noting — token still embeds old username; a refresh endpoint or short token TTL would be safer.

Public /api/cases ordering uses 'updated_at' which is updated by every showcase toggle — fine. Confirmed sensitive fields (password_hash, files, created_by, customer_user_id) are NOT returned by projection.
ProjectIn.parameters / drawing_urls remain in the schema as legacy (no longer editable). Good backward-compat decision.
seed_data_creation: test_iteration4.py creates TEST_user_*, TEST_cust_*, and TEST_SC_* project, then cleans them up in the module fixture teardown. No leftover data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run backend with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4.py /app/backend/tests/test_admin_api.py -v. The /app/backend/tests/test_leads.py file has 2 outdated cases expecting GET /api/leads to be public; safe to ignore or update. Frontend uses these new testids: nav-cta-login, admin-nav-profile, profile-root, profile-username, profile-current-password, profile-new-password, profile-confirm-password, profile-save-basic, profile-save-password, pf-is-showcase, pf-sc-industry/metric/quote/author, section-drawing, section-code, upload-drawing-btn, upload-code-btn, file-card-{id}, rename-{id}, rename-input-{id}, rename-save-{id}, toggle-showcase-btn, showcase_badge. Login page does NOT use input[name=username] — use the data-testid on inputs or positional <input> (form has 2 inputs). Default lang is CN.
rca_of_the_issue: No blocking bugs. One minor console warning (hydration: <span> inside <option>) traced to Emergent visual-editor instrumentation injecting tracking spans into JSX expressions inside <option>{...}</option>. Workaround: avoid expression children in <option>; concatenate string before render.
